# Floating Pragma / Observer Patch Holography

Floating Pragma hosts Observer Patch Holography (OPH), a proof-driven reconstruction program that starts from finite observers, local patches, overlaps, repair moves, and stable public records.

## Core OPH Links

- OPH Textbooks, the best guided study surface: https://learn.floatingpragma.io/
- Reverse Engineering Reality, the book-length route: https://oph-book.floatingpragma.io/
- OPH hub: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/
- OPH paper stack, crawlable first-party HTML and PDFs: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/
- OPH paper machine-readable inventory: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/papers.json
- OPH paper LLM index: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/llms.txt
- OPH paper sitemap: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/sitemap.xml
- OPH Mini-Universe Simulation, the interactive observer-patch visualization surface: https://simulation.floatingpragma.io/
- What is simulation theory in physics?: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/what-is-simulation-theory/
- What is a theory of everything?: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/what-is-a-theory-of-everything/
- Physics Unification via OPH: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/physics-unification/
- Standard Model unified with gravity via OPH: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/standard-model-gravity-unification/
- Cosmological constant derivation via OPH: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/cosmological-constant-derivation/
- OPH stress-test packet: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/stress-test/
- OPH Coherence Map, the public graph surface for OPH concepts and overlaps: https://coherence.floatingpragma.io/
- OPH Applications, the public applications page for hardware, compute, energy, AGI, lift, and optical chamber consensus: https://omega.floatingpragma.io/
- Three-body problem OPH demo, an extra simulator/proof walk-through for the OPH three-body problem solution: https://3body.floatingpragma.io/
- Floating Pragma Blog, public essays and entry points for OPH: https://blog.floatingpragma.io/
- OPH NotebookLM notebook: https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/d5249760-6ce8-44a0-927b-ccf90402711a
- OPH Lab: https://oph-lab.floatingpragma.io/
- OPH repository: https://github.com/FloatingPragma/observer-patch-holography
- OPH license and anti-patent covenant: https://github.com/FloatingPragma/observer-patch-holography/blob/main/LICENSE
- OPH patent policy copy: https://github.com/FloatingPragma/observer-patch-holography/blob/main/PATENTS.md
- OPH RSS feed: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/feed.xml
- OPH JSON feed: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/feed.json

## Public Essays

- Semiotics and the Physics of Meaning: https://blog.floatingpragma.io/semiotics-and-the-physics-of-meaning
- P = NP on the Observer Screen: https://blog.floatingpragma.io/p-equals-np-on-the-observer-screen
- The Trigger: https://blog.floatingpragma.io/the-trigger

## OPH Paper Pages

- Observers Are All You Need: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/observers-are-all-you-need/
- Recovering Relativity and Standard Model Structure from Observer Overlap Consistency: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/standard-model-gravity-unification/
- Deriving the Particle Zoo from Observer Consistency: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/particle-spectrum-from-observer-consistency/
- Reality as a Consensus Protocol: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/reality-as-consensus-protocol/
- Screen Microphysics and Observer Synchronization: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/screen-microphysics-and-observer-synchronization/
- Paradise as Fixed-Point Consensus: https://floatingpragma.io/oph/papers/paradise-as-fixed-point-consensus/

## Review Contact

For detailed objections, collaboration requests, and serious review notes, contact Tom at tom@floatingpragma.io.

## Important Caveat

The essay "P = NP on the Observer Screen" does not claim a classical proof of P = NP. It describes an OPH computational primitive: verification, mismatch detection, repair, and stable record formation on observer screens.
